ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Oct-17-2018 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Distribution Of Reserve
Off Calendar Oct-03-2018 Continued To Oct-17-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Administrator and the Attorney to appear on October 17, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why they failed to report on status of distribution of the reserve. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Distribution Of Reserve
Off Calendar Sep-19-2018 Continued To Oct-03-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Personal Representative and the Attorney to appear on October 3, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why they have not reported on status of the reserve. Status on distribution of the $50,000.00 reserve is also continued to that date.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
